*اللّه ہم سب کو ہمیشہ اپنے لائف پارٹنرز کا وفادار رکھے اور ہمیشہ اپنے گھروں میں شاد و آباد رکھے۔۔۔*

comment_text:
PepsiCo just killed a household staple: ProNutro.  

Since its launch in 1962, ProNutro was known as the world’s first nutraceutical cereal—designed to provide health benefits beyond basic nutrition. The Original High-Protein Cereal delivered plant-based protein, energy, plus 13 vitamins and 4 minerals.  

Back in the 1900s, the South African Institute for Medical Research developed ProNutro to fight widespread protein deficiency and malnutrition.  

Now PepsiCo owns the parent company and has changed the formula. It’s clumpier, the smell is off, and even pets that used to eat it alongside their owners are refusing it entirely
